The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
STAR ATLAS #254 JONI’s WEIRD ASS HAND
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Metaverse Nomads #166 Star Atlas w/ Emperor
Metaverse Nomads posted their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #149
Aephia published their Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas is back! Inside Scoop from Founder Michael Wagner at Impact Summit 2024
Funjible Games posted a video interviewing Michael Wagner at the Impact Summit.
Star Atlas Economic Report 2024 Q3
Star Atlas published their latest quarterly economic report.
Star Atlas CEO Keynote – Impact Summit 2024
Star Atlas posted a video of the keynote from the Impact Summit.
The Atlas Brew #130
Star Atlas TV posted a recording of the latest Atlas Brew.
Our Approach to Building Credibility in “Web3 Gaming” – Impact Summit 2024
Star Atlas posted a video on a session from the Impact Summit.
Star Atlas Brew #130: Naabathon Submissions – TLDR
Beth posted a video recapping the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Economic Forum (October 2024)
Star Atlas TV posted a recording of the latest Economic Forum.
Star Atlas October 2024 Economic Forum
Beyond the Horizon posted a video discussing the Economic Forum.
Star Atlas – CommandDeck #12 : SA News, MUD Empire Event & raffle,..!
NebularTV posted their latest Star Atlas podcast.
